content.json:
# 📞 Call Center GenAI Tracing Workbook
Call-first observability for the NovaTel Communications agents across **traces**, **requests**, and **dependencies**. Use the time range selector to scope every panel below.

This workbook tracks the `intent-classification-agent` and `resolution-advisor-agent` as they classify and resolve calls `CALL-001`–`CALL-007`.

content.query: let base = union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend CallId = extract(@'(CALL-\d{3})', 1, Payload), CustomerId = extract(@'(CUST-\d{4})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(CallId) or isnotempty(AgentName); base | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Total Traces', Order = 0 | union (base | summarize Value = dcountif(AgentName, isnotempty(AgentName)) | extend Metric = 'Agents Active', Order = 1) | union (base | summarize Value = dcountif(CallId, isnotempty(CallId)) | extend Metric = 'Calls Seen', Order = 2) | union (base | summarize Value = dcount(operation_Id) | extend Metric = 'Operations', Order = 3) | order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

content.json:
## Agent KPIs
Invocations, distinct operations, latency, and token usage per agent.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | extend DurationMs = todouble(column_ifexists('duration', real(null))) | extend InputTokens = toint(coalesce(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'], customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.prompt_tokens'])) | extend OutputTokens = toint(coalesce(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens'], customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.completion_tokens'])) | summarize Invocations = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), AvgDurationMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 1), InputTokens = sum(InputTokens), OutputTokens = sum(OutputTokens), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by AgentName | order by Invocations desc

dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize AvgDurationMs = avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 5m), AgentName | order by timestamp asc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize Invocations = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), AgentName | order by timestamp asc

content.json:
## Calls & Customers
Every trace mapped back to a call and customer ID.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend CallId = extract(@'(CALL-\d{3})', 1, Payload), CustomerId = extract(@'(CUST-\d{4})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(CallId) | summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), Agents = make_set_if(AgentName, isnotempty(AgentName)), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by CallId, CustomerId | order by CallId asc

content.json:
## Intent & Priority Distribution
What the agents are classifying across recent calls.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Intent = extract(@'(billing_dispute|technical_issue|cancellation|upsell_opportunity|account_support|security_concern)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(Intent) | summarize Count = count() by Intent | order by Count desc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Priority = tolower(extract(@'(?i)\b(critical|high|medium|low)\b', 1, Payload)) | where isnotempty(Priority) | summarize Count = count() by Priority | order by Count desc

content.json:
## Tool Call Health
Usage of the `lookup_customer` function tool the agents call to fetch call context.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Tool = extract(@'(lookup_customer)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(Tool) | extend DurationMs = todouble(column_ifexists('duration', real(null))) | summarize Calls = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), AvgDurationMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 1), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by Tool | order by Calls desc

content.json:
## Errors & Failures
Failed dependencies, failed requests, and exceptions in the selected window. An empty table here is good news.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true (dependencies | where success == false), (requests | where success == false), exceptions | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(column_ifexists('outerMessage', '')), ' ', tostring(column_ifexists('problemId', '')), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload), CallId = extract(@'(CALL-\d{3})', 1, Payload) | project timestamp, Type = itemType, AgentName, CallId, Problem = coalesce(tostring(column_ifexists('problemId', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('name', ''))), resultCode = column_ifexists('resultCode', '') | order by timestamp desc
